testcase.name: Video Autoplay Fix Validation > YouTubeEmbed Component Fixes > should auto-play when expanded mode is enabled
Video Autoplay Fix Validation > YouTubeEmbed Component Fixes > should start playing with single click from thumbnail
Video Autoplay Fix Validation > YouTubeEmbed Component Fixes > should properly handle user interaction state for autoplay compliance

testcase.name: Video Autoplay Fix Validation > YouTubeEmbed Component Fixes > should force iframe reload when transitioning to autoplay
Video Autoplay Fix Validation > EnhancedLinkPreview Integration > should expand YouTube video to playing state with single click
testcase.system-out: ✅ Got real YouTube metadata: Test YouTube Video
testcase.system-err: Backend preview API unavailable, using fallback: domain is not defined

testcase.name: Video Autoplay Fix Validation > EnhancedLinkPreview Integration > should show collapse option after expanding video
testcase.system-out: ✅ Got real YouTube metadata: Test YouTube Video
testcase.system-err: Backend preview API unavailable, using fallback: domain is not defined

testcase.name: Video Autoplay Fix Validation > Browser Autoplay Policy Compliance > should always mute videos for autoplay compliance
Video Autoplay Fix Validation > Browser Autoplay Policy Compliance > should include all necessary iframe permissions
Video Autoplay Fix Validation > Browser Autoplay Policy Compliance > should handle iframe loading states properly
Video Autoplay Fix Validation > Error Handling and Fallbacks > should handle iframe loading errors gracefully
Video Autoplay Fix Validation > Error Handling and Fallbacks > should provide fallback for missing video data

testcase.name: SPARC Video & Link Preview Fix Validation > CRITICAL FIX 1: YouTube Autoplay Single-Click > should autoplay video immediately on single click in expanded mode
SPARC Video & Link Preview Fix Validation > CRITICAL FIX 1: YouTube Autoplay Single-Click > should enable autoplay after single thumbnail click

testcase.name: SPARC Video & Link Preview Fix Validation > SPARC INTEGRATION: End-to-End Video Flow > should complete full video interaction flow without issues
testcase.system-out: ✅ Got real YouTube metadata: Real Site Title
testcase.system-err: Backend preview API unavailable, using fallback: domain is not defined
